home.heroSub: Training the next generation of healthcare leaders for Tealand and the federal union.
home.introBody: Established in 2026, Tealand Medical School (TMS) is a center of excellence dedicated to producing medical doctors who are equipped to serve the healthcare needs of Tealand and the wider federal union. We combine international academic standards with a deep commitment to social justice and community service.

about.heroSub: Our story, our mission, and our commitment to excellence.
about.overviewBody: Established in 2026, Tealand Medical School (TMS) is a center of excellence dedicated to producing medical doctors who are equipped to serve the healthcare needs of Tealand and the wider federal union. We combine international academic standards with a deep commitment to social justice and community service.
about.visionBody: To be a learning center of excellence in medical education that produces competent, ethical, and socially accountable medical doctors dedicated to serving the health needs of the people of Tealand and the wider federal union.

missionItems.title: Quality Education
missionItems.body: To provide high-quality medical education aligned with international standards and national interim frameworks.

missionItems.title: Healthcare Solutions
missionItems.body: To address the critical shortage of healthcare professionals in underserved and conflict-affected regions.

missionItems.title: Social Impact
missionItems.body: To foster a learning environment that emphasizes professional integrity, human rights, and social justice.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.body: A steadfast commitment to high academic and clinical standards.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.body: Strict adherence to ethical, medical, and academic practices.

coreValues.title: Equity
coreValues.body: Ensuring non-discriminatory access to education and healthcare for all.

coreValues.title: Accountability
coreValues.body: Maintaining a deep responsibility to the community and governing authorities.

about.governanceBody: Tealand Medical School operates under the Ta'angland Health Council (THC). Strategic decisions are managed by the TMS Governing Board, while academic integrity is ensured through our affiliation with IUC-UMM.

orgItems.title: Academic Wing
orgItems.body: Academic Council, Vice-Principal (Academic), and Heads of Pre-Clinical, Para-Clinical, and Clinical Departments.

orgItems.title: Administrative Wing
orgItems.body: Vice-Principal (Admin & Ops), Finance, HR, and Security Units.

academics.heroSub: A rigorous, integrated 6-year M.B,B.S. programme built for excellence.
academics.overviewBody: Tealand Medical School (TMS) offers a rigorous 6-year M.B,B.S. program designed to produce medical professionals who are technically competent and socially responsible. Our curriculum follows the modern Integrated Medical Education model, blending theoretical knowledge with early clinical exposure.
academics.curriculumBody: The curriculum is divided into three distinct phases to ensure a smooth transition from basic sciences to advanced clinical practice.

phases.title: Pre-Clinical Sciences
phases.desc: Foundation in anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, and behavioural sciences. Early patient contact integrated from Year 1.

phases.title: Para-Clinical Sciences
phases.desc: Pathology, pharmacology, microbiology, and community medicine. Problem-based learning and clinical skills labs.

phases.title: Clinical Training
phases.desc: Rotations in medicine, surgery, obstetrics, paediatrics, and community health at THC-authorised facilities.

methodItems.title: Theoretical Modules
methodItems.body: Delivered through advanced e-learning platforms and virtual classrooms.

methodItems.title: Clinical Training
methodItems.body: Conducted face-to-face at health facilities authorized by the Ta'angland Health Council (THC).

methodItems.title: Integrated Learning
methodItems.body: Bridging the gap between foundational sciences and clinical application from day one.

assessmentItems.title: Formative Assessment
assessmentItems.body: Continuous evaluation through quizzes, clinical observations, and feedback.

assessmentItems.title: Summative Assessment
assessmentItems.body: Professional examinations conducted in strict coordination with the IUC-UMM standards.

faqItems.q: How long is the M.B,B.S. program?
faqItems.a: The program is 6 years in total, divided into three phases: Pre-Clinical, Para-Clinical, and Clinical.
The degree is officially conferred by the Interim University Council, University of Medicine, Mandalay (IUC-UMM).

faqItems.q: What language is instruction conducted in?
faqItems.a: Instruction is conducted in English with Myanmar language support available.
Yes. TMS uses a Blended Learning approach — theoretical modules are delivered online, while clinical training is in-person.
Yes. Clinical training is conducted at THC-authorised health facilities, ensuring all students receive practical exposure.

admissions.heroSub: Join TMS — transparent, merit-based, and equitable admissions.
admissions.overviewBody: Tealand Medical School seeks dedicated students who are committed to serving their communities. Our admission policy is built on the principles of transparency, merit, and social equity.

processSteps.title: Check Eligibility
processSteps.desc: Review selection criteria and ensure you meet academic and personal requirements.

processSteps.title: Submit Application
processSteps.desc: Complete the online application form with all required documents.

processSteps.title: Entrance Evaluation
processSteps.desc: Sit the TMS entrance assessment — designed to evaluate academic ability and ethical reasoning.

processSteps.title: Interview
processSteps.desc: Selected candidates will be invited for a personal interview with the admissions panel.

processSteps.title: Offer & Enrollment
processSteps.desc: Successful applicants receive an offer letter and complete enrollment formalities.

criteriaItems.title: Academic Merit
criteriaItems.body: Previous educational performance in science-related subjects.

criteriaItems.title: Entrance Evaluation
criteriaItems.body: Success in the TMS entrance assessment process.

criteriaItems.title: Personal Integrity
criteriaItems.body: A demonstrated commitment to medical ethics and community service.

admissions.equityBody: In line with our mission to address healthcare shortages in underserved regions, special consideration and priority are given to:
equityItems: Students from underserved ethnic communities across the federal union

recognitionItems.title: Official Awarding
recognitionItems.body: The M.B,B.S. degree is officially conferred by the Interim University Council, University of Medicine, Mandalay (IUC-UMM).

recognitionItems.title: Accreditation
recognitionItems.body: TMS is institutionally registered with the NUG Ministry of Education (MOE) and operates in policy coordination with the NUG Ministry of Health (MOH).

recognitionItems.title: Credit Transfers
recognitionItems.body: Through the NUG/EAO health network, we facilitate credit transfers and clinical placement rotations at various partner hospitals.

faqItems.q: What are the academic requirements to apply?
faqItems.a: Applicants must have a strong background in science subjects. Specific requirements will be published with each intake announcement.
Details on tuition and financial assistance will be provided in the official admissions announcement.

faqItems.q: Can students from outside Tealand apply?
faqItems.a: Yes. While priority is given to Tealand candidates, students from other EAO regions within the federal union are also welcome to apply.

faqItems.q: When does the application portal open?
faqItems.a: The application portal opening date is announced each year. Check the Announcements page for the latest information.

faqItems.q: Will my M.B,B.S. degree be recognised nationally?
faqItems.a: Yes. The degree is conferred by IUC-UMM and TMS is affiliated with the NUG MOE and MOH, ensuring national recognition.
